pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'Save the result as Property_Listing_Email.docx in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents folder'; verifier.py line 71 copies from this exact path
3145728 bytes = 3 * 1024 * 1024 = exactly 3 MB; task description states 'under 3MB'; verifier.py line 30 confirms MAX_SIZE_BYTES = 3 * 1024 * 1024
Task description explicitly states 'all three images' and mentions 'Compress all pictures in the document'; verifier.py line 31 sets EXPECTED_IMG_COUNT = 3 and line 79 checks that media files >= 3

Task description line 5: 'Apply the Simple Frame, White picture style to ALL three images'; web search confirmed Simple Frame, White is a standard Microsoft Word picture style in the Picture Styles gallery; verifier.py lines 101-117 check for white border patterns consistent with this style
Task description states: 'It contains high-resolution images that make the file too large to email (~12MB)'
Task description line 5: 'Crop the first image (Exterior) to remove the left ~20% of the photo (the driveway edge)'
Task description line 5: 'Compress all pictures in the document to E-mail (96 ppi) resolution'; web search confirmed 96 ppi is a standard Microsoft Word email compression preset for screen viewing
Task description line 5: 'ensuring Delete cropped areas of pictures is selected to reduce file size'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires optimizing a real estate listing document (Property_Listing_Draft.docx) with three images (~12MB) to create Property_Listing_Email.docx under 3MB. Key operations: crop the first image (Exterior) by removing left ~20%, apply 'Simple Frame, White' picture style to all three images, compress images to 'E-mail (96 ppi)' resolution with cropped areas deleted. Final deliverable must contain all three images and be under 3145728 bytes (exactly 3MB). Simple Frame, White is a standard Microsoft Word picture style applying white border frames. Email compression at 96 ppi is Microsoft's standard preset for email optimization.
